mapper.insert: INSERT INTO item_posts (user_id, type, title, category, event_date, location, description, hidden_feature, status, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{category}, #{eventDate}, #{location}, #{description}, #{hiddenFeature}, #{status}, #{createdAt})
INSERT INTO item_images (item_id, object_key, url, sort_order) VALUES (#{itemId}, #{objectKey}, #{url}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.sql: SELECT p.id, p.user_id, p.type, p.title, p.category, p.event_date, p.location, p.description, p.hidden_feature, p.status, p.created_at, u.name AS publisher_name, u.verified AS publisher_verified FROM item_posts p JOIN users u ON u.id = p.user_id
mapper.select: WHERE p.status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
JOIN item_favorites f ON f.item_id = p.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY f.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO item_favorites (user_id, item_id, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{itemId}, #{createdAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM item_favorites WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND item_id = #{itemId}
mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END FROM item_favorites WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND item_id = #{itemId}
SELECT id, item_id, object_key, url, sort_order FROM item_images WHERE item_id = #{itemId} ORDER BY sort_order
